suite.name: Test Runtime

kw.name: Netlab Up
Netlab Up
kw.msg: ${stdout} = Creating configuration files [CONFIG] spine1: normalize,initial,spine,isis-timers,isis-auth,bfd [CONFIG] spine2: normalize,initial,spine,isis-timers,isis-auth,bfd [CONFIG] leaf1: normalize,initial,...

${stderr} = 15:51:31 INFO Containerlab started version=0.74.3 15:51:31 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 15:51:31 INFO Removing directory path=/home/linadmin/work/netlab/tmp/clab-tmp 15:51:31 INFO Cr...
kw.doc: Run `netlab up` to start the lab.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Start the lab via `netlab up`. Fails if any node is unreachable or config deployment fails.

test.name: Lab Should Start Successfully

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Lab started successfully
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

test.doc: Verified by Suite Setup (netlab up).

test.name: All Nodes Should Run Arista cEOS

kw.name: Verify All Nodes Respond
Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg:
${output} = Arista cEOSLab Hardware version: Serial number: 68891F1D797A0FF69C4D4E95BFDF30B0 Hardware MAC address: 001c.7343.c7d7 System MAC address: 001c.7343.c7d7
Software image version: 4.34.2.2F-46218727.43...

Software image version: 4.34.2.2F-46218727.43...

Verify all nodes respond with correct version.

test.name: All Data Interfaces Should Be Up On Spine Nodes

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.
Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${up_count} = ['Ethernet1 10.2.1.0/31 up up', 'Ethernet2 10.2.1.2/31 up up', 'Ethernet3 10.2.1.4/31 up up']
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.
Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${up_count} = ['Ethernet1 10.2.2.0/31 up up', 'Ethernet2 10.2.2.2/31 up up', 'Ethernet3 10.2.2.4/31 up up']
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

test.doc: Verify all Ethernet interfaces on spine nodes are up/up.

test.doc: Verify Loopback0 interface status is up/up.

test.name: IS-IS Neighbors Should Be UP On Spine1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg: ${output} = Instance VRF System Id Type Interface SNPA State Hold time Circuit Id CORE default leaf1 L2 Ethernet1 P2P UP ...
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.

kw.msg: ${output} = Instance VRF System Id Type Interface SNPA State Hold time Circuit Id CORE default leaf1 L2 Ethernet1 P2P UP ...

test.doc: Verify IS-IS instance name is CORE.

test.name: IS-IS Should Distribute Routes On Spine1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.msg: ${output} = VRF: default Source Codes: C - connected, S - static, K - kernel, O - OSPF, O IA - OSPF inter area, O E1 - OSPF external type 1, O E2 - OSPF external type 2, O N1 - OSPF NSSA exte...
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.

kw.msg: ${output} = VRF: default Source Codes: C - connected, S - static, K - kernel, O - OSPF, O IA - OSPF inter area, O E1 - OSPF external type 1, O E2 - OSPF external type 2, O N1 - OSPF NSSA exte...
kw.doc: Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to leaf1
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to leaf2
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.arg: spine1 should have route to leaf3
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2-leaf1
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2-leaf2
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: spine1 should have route to spine2-leaf3
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: spine1 should have IS-IS routes to spine2 and all leaf loopbacks.

test.name: IS-IS Should Distribute Routes On Leaf1

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command

kw.name: Run Show Command

kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

test.doc: leaf1 should have 2 BFD sessions to spines.

test.name: BFD Sessions Should Be Up On Spine2

kw.name: Run Show Command
Run Show Command
kw.doc: Keyword alias for netlab_connect_show.
Run `netlab connect <node> --show <cmd>` and return output.

Run Show Command

test.doc: Verify BFD is registered with IS-IS protocol.

test.name: Ping spine1 To leaf1 Loopback Should Succeed

kw.name: Run Ping Command
Run Ping
kw.msg: ${output} = PING 10.0.11.1 (10.0.11.1) from 10.0.1.1 : 72(100) bytes of data. 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.085 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.013 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.1...
kw.doc: Ping from a node via `netlab connect` (no show prefix).

kw.msg: ${output} = PING 10.0.11.1 (10.0.11.1) from 10.0.1.1 : 72(100) bytes of data. 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.085 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.11.1: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.013 ms 80 bytes from 10.0.1...
kw.doc: Ping from a node via `netlab connect`.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Lab Should Tear Down Successfully

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Lab torn down successfully
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

test.doc: Verified by Suite Teardown (netlab down).

kw.name: Run Keywords
Wait For Topology To Stabilize
Sleep
kw.msg: Wait for IS-IS adjacencies and BFD sessions
kw.arg: Wait for IS-IS adjacencies and BFD sessions
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Wait for adjacencies to fully establish after lab startup.

kw.name: Netlab Down
Netlab Down
kw.msg: ${stdout} = Checking virtualization provider installation OK: clab installed and working correctly Stopping clab nodes

${stderr} = 15:53:34 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 15:53:34 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 15:53:34 INFO Destroying lab name=tmp 15:53:34 INFO Removed container name=clab-tmp-spin...
kw.doc: Run `netlab down` to tear down the lab.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Tear down the lab via `netlab down`.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

suite.doc: Runtime tests — validates POD after `netlab up`: - Lab lifecycle (netlab up / netlab down) - Node version and reachability - Interface status (up/up) - IS-IS adjacencies (neighbors UP) - IS-IS route exchange (all loopbacks learned) - BFD sessions (state Up, correct timers) - End-to-end ping (spine-to-leaf, leaf-to-leaf, leaf-to-spine)

suite.name: Test Capture

kw.name: Netlab Up
Netlab Up
kw.msg: ${stdout} = Creating configuration files [CONFIG] spine1: normalize,initial,spine,isis-timers,isis-auth,bfd [CONFIG] spine2: normalize,initial,spine,isis-timers,isis-auth,bfd [CONFIG] leaf1: normalize,initial,...

${stderr} = 15:53:36 INFO Containerlab started version=0.74.3 15:53:36 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 15:53:36 INFO Removing directory path=/home/linadmin/work/netlab/tmp/clab-tmp 15:53:36 INFO Cr...
kw.doc: Run `netlab up` to start the lab.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Start the lab via `netlab up`. Fails if any node is unreachable or config deployment fails.

test.name: IS-IS Hello Packets Should Be Captured On spine1

kw.name: Capture Packets
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:54:41.256747 ca:f0:00:01:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 1500: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): p2p IIH, src-id 0100.0000.1001, ...
kw.doc: Capture packets on a node interface using docker exec + tcpdump.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Capture IS-IS IIH (Hello) packets on spine1.

test.name: IS-IS Hello Should Contain spine1 Source System ID

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:54:42.698246 ca:f0:00:01:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 124: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): length 121 L2 LSP, hlen: 27, v: ...
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${has_iih} = ['p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), max-area: 3 (0)\n\t source-id: 0100.0000.1001', 'p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), max-area: 3 (0)\n\t source-id: 0100.000...
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: IIH from spine1 should contain system-id 0100.0000.1001
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify IS-IS Hello from spine1 contains correct system ID.

test.name: IS-IS Hello Should Be Level 2 Only

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:55:01.168379 ca:f0:00:03:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 118: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): length 115 L2 CSNP, hlen: 33, v:...
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${has_iih_l2} = ['p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), max-area: 3 (0)\n\t source-id: 0100.0001.1001, holding time: 9s, Flags: [Level 2 only', 'p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), ...
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: IIH should have Level 2 only flag
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify IS-IS Hello has Level-2 only flag set.

test.name: IS-IS Hello Should Contain Area Address 49.0001

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:55:04.527779 ca:f0:00:03:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 1500: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): length 1497 p2p IIH, hlen: 20, ...
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg:
${has_iih_area} = ['p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), max-area: 3 (0)
	 source-id: 0100.0001.1001, holding time: 9s, Flags: [Level 2 only]
	 circuit-id: 0x1f, PDU length: 1497
	 Protocols...
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify IS-IS Hello contains area address 49.0001.

test.name: IS-IS Hello Should Advertise IPv4

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:55:07.909836 ca:f0:00:01:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 118: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): length 115 L2 CSNP, hlen: 33, v:...
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg:
${has_iih_ipv4} = ['p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), max-area: 3 (0)
	 source-id: 0100.0000.1001, holding time: 9s, Flags: [Level 2 only]
	 circuit-id: 0x1e, PDU length: 1497
	 Protocols...
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify IS-IS Hello has NLPID IPv4.

test.name: IS-IS Hello From leaf1 Should Have Different System ID

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:55:12.633613 ca:f0:00:01:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 1500: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): length 1497 p2p IIH, hlen: 20, ...
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.msg: ${has_iih} = ['p2p IIH, hlen: 20, v: 1, pdu-v: 1, sys-id-len: 6 (0), max-area: 3 (0)\n\t source-id: 0100.0001.1001']
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: IIH from leaf1 should contain system-id 0100.0001.1001
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify IS-IS Hello from leaf1 has different system ID.

test.name: IS-IS CSNP Packets Should Be Captured

kw.name: Capture Packets
kw.msg: ${output} = 10:55:17.806389 ca:f0:00:01:00:01 > 09:00:2b:00:00:05, 802.3, length 118: LLC, dsap OSI (0xfe) Individual, ssap OSI (0xfe) Command, ctrl 0x03: OSI NLPID IS-IS (0x83): L2 CSNP, src-id 0100.0000.1001.00...
kw.doc: Capture packets on a node interface using docker exec + tcpdump.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: IS-IS CSNP Should Contain LSP Entries

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose

kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify IS-IS CSNP contains LSP entry references.

test.name: BFD Packets Should Be Captured On spine1

kw.name: Capture Packets
kw.doc: Capture packets on a node interface using docker exec + tcpdump.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Should capture at least 5 BFD packets
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Capture BFD control packets on spine1.

test.name: BFD Packets Should Have State Up

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: BFD packets should have State Up
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: At least one BFD packet should be State Up
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify captured BFD packets have State Up.

test.name: BFD Packets Should Use UDP Port 3784

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify BFD packets use UDP port 3784.

test.name: BFD Packets Should Have Correct Timers

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify BFD packet intervals are 100ms.

test.name: BFD Packets Should Have Multiplier 3

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify BFD packet multiplier is 3.

test.name: BFD Packets Should Have TTL 255

kw.name: Capture Packets Verbose
kw.doc: Capture packets with verbose tcpdump output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify BFD packets have TTL 255 (security requirement).

kw.name: Netlab Down
Netlab Down
kw.msg: ${stdout} = Checking virtualization provider installation OK: clab installed and working correctly Stopping clab nodes

${stderr} = 15:55:39 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 15:55:39 INFO Parsing & checking topology file=clab.yml 15:55:39 INFO Destroying lab name=tmp 15:55:40 INFO Removed container name=clab-tmp-spin...
kw.doc: Run `netlab down` to tear down the lab.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Tear down the lab via `netlab down`.

suite.doc: Packet capture tests — captures IS-IS and BFD packets on live POD using docker exec + tcpdump, validates packet contents. Lab lifecycle is managed via `netlab up` / `netlab down`.
